title: Infrastructure as Code for Beginners (AWS CDK)
summary: Tutorial on Infrastructure as Code using AWS Cloud Development Kit with Python. Demonstrates building a serverless REST API by comparing manual AWS console setup versus automated CDK deployment, covering DynamoDB, Lambda, and API Gateway.
